Hero.headlineHighlight: Upgrade your CV, upgrade your career.
Hero.headlineText: A smart platform to help you level up and land a job faster.
Hero.description: Cetha helps you create a standout CV, optimize your profile, and find the right job — all in one place.

benefits.jobMatch: Job recommendations based on your skills

Advantages.title: A Smarter Way to Achieve Your Dream Career
Advantages.description: Cetha helps you build a standout CV, optimize your LinkedIn profile, and get job recommendations that match your skills — all in one platform.

cv.title: Instant CV Review
cv.description: Upload your CV, let AI analyze it, and get improvement suggestions to make it more attractive and ATS-friendly.

linkedin.title: Standout LinkedIn Profile
linkedin.description: Get suggestions for your headline, summary, and skills to increase visibility for recruiters.

jobs.title: Jobs That Fit You
jobs.description: AI finds job opportunities based on your skills, experience, and location — so you only see relevant listings.

HowItWorks.title: How Cetha Helps You Land Your Dream Job
HowItWorks.description: Follow these simple steps to optimize your CV, LinkedIn profile, and find the most relevant job opportunities.

register.title: Sign Up & Create Your Profile
register.description: Create a free account and fill in your basic information so the system understands your background.

features.text: Sign up in just a few clicks.

cv.title: AI-Powered CV Review
cv.description: Upload your CV and let AI analyze it instantly with suggestions to improve visibility and pass ATS.

linkedin.title: Optimize Your LinkedIn Profile
linkedin.description: Enter your LinkedIn URL and get tips for headlines, summaries, and skills to stand out.

jobs.title: Get Job Recommendations
jobs.description: See job recommendations that match your skills and experience.

hero.title: Enhance Your Professional Profile with AI
hero.description: Optimize your resume with AI to highlight your strengths and best experiences in today’s competitive job market.

step1.title: 1. Upload Your CV
step1.description: Upload your CV and receive AI-powered analysis and improvement recommendations within seconds.

step2.title: 2. View Your CV Score and Strengths
step2.description: AI analyzes your CV quality based on impact, structure, and recruiter appeal to identify strong areas and opportunities for improvement.
step2.impactDescription: Your work experience already demonstrates clear and relevant impact for your target role.

step3.title: 3. Get CV Suggestions & Improvements
step3.description: AI analyzes your CV and provides specific recommendations to strengthen content quality, role relevance, and your chances of passing screening stages.

improvements.point: Add measurable results to your work experience
improvements.explanation: Some of your work experiences are still descriptive. Add concrete metrics such as sales growth, process efficiency, or user growth to demonstrate real impact and strengthen your competitiveness.

improvements.point: Clarify your professional summary at the top
improvements.explanation: Your professional summary is still too general. Use 2–3 concise sentences highlighting your core expertise, key experience, and unique value proposition so recruiters immediately understand your positioning.

cta.title: Ready to Upgrade Your CV?
cta.description: Get in-depth AI analysis and recommendations to improve structure, wording, and recruiter appeal.
cta.footnote: Fast process • Professional insights • Ready to send to recruiters

ArticleAndVideo.title: Learn Smarter. Get Hired Faster.
ArticleAndVideo.description: Discover practical guides and career strategy videos to improve your CV quality and increase your chances of getting hired.

LinkedinImproveSection.title: Enhance Your Professional Profile with AI
LinkedinImproveSection.description: Optimize your LinkedIn profile with AI to highlight your strengths, experience, and professional positioning in today’s competitive job market.

tooltip.title: AI LinkedIn Insight
tooltip.description: We thoroughly analyze your LinkedIn profile and provide strategic recommendations to improve your headline, summary, and professional positioning to make your profile more appealing to recruiters.

cvPanel.title: AI-Powered CV & Career Review
cvPanel.description: Get professional insights for your CV, LinkedIn profile, and career direction within seconds.

linkedinPanel.title: Optimize Your LinkedIn Profile
linkedinPanel.description: Improve your headline, summary, and work experience to attract recruiters and hiring managers.

mobile.title: AI-Based Career Review
mobile.description: Get instant insights for your professional profile and career direction.

Footer.description: AI-powered CV review to help you build a better career future.

pricingQuota.title: Pay Once, Use as You Need
pricingQuota.description: Get review quotas to analyze your CV and receive job recommendations tailored to your needs.

beginner.tagline: Try the review features at an affordable price.

professional.tagline: For active job seekers who want more detailed results.

exclusive.tagline: Full access with the fastest and most accurate results.
features: Job matching based on interests & experience

quotes.quote: All the tools we need are now available in a single platform that is clean, intuitive, and easy to use.
quotes.name: Karen Yue

quotes.quote: The CV review and career development process has become far more structured, fast, and efficient.
quotes.name: Andi Pratama

quotes.quote: The workflow feels simpler and helps us make more accurate career decisions.
quotes.name: Sinta Maharani

reviewCv.title: Instant CV Review
reviewCv.desc: Get professional feedback for your CV

jobMatch.title: Job Match
jobMatch.desc: Best job recommendations based on your CV

NotFound.title: Error 404: Page Not Found!
NotFound.description: We’ve looked everywhere, but couldn’t find the page you were looking for.

tokenMessage.low: Your tokens are almost depleted. Add more tokens to keep using AI.

tokenMessage.safe: Your tokens are still sufficient. Use AI to boost your career.

toast.fillFirst: Write key points first so AI can generate content.

subtitles: Today is an opportunity to move further than yesterday.
Your consistency today is a real investment for the future.
Every small step brings you closer to your big goals.
Recruiters are looking for someone like you today.
A strong profile is the gateway to the best opportunities.
Don't stop — your breakthrough might be just one step away.

DashboardAds.title: Get Expert Feedback
DashboardAds.description: Our AI reviews your CV and suggests improvements to help you stand out.
DashboardAds.tip: Add measurable achievements to strengthen your experience section.

DashboardAds2.title: Build a
DashboardAds2.description: Use our smart templates and AI-guided prompts to craft a professional CV tailored to the role you want — no design skills needed.

DashboardAds3.title: Optimize Your
DashboardAds3.description: Transform your LinkedIn profile into a recruiter magnet. Our AI rewrites your headline, about section, and experience for maximum impact.

DashboardAds4.title: Find Jobs That
DashboardAds4.description: We provide personalized job recommendations tailored to your unique skills, experience, and interests, helping you discover the best opportunities that match your career goals. Our listings are updated daily from trusted sources to ensure you never miss a relevant opening.
